title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: EAST BEND CLUB HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities, and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 1707 SE Tempest Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-6:30pm Email (541) 385-3009 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 385-3009 Main phone Main phone (541) 385-3009 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25 annual membership, $150 monthly fee for after school program, and $1350 for 10-week summer program. Scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Bend Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
